scope: Medical Intelligence Atlas stack layer gate using repo local artifacts and synthetic boundaries only.

status_vocabulary.machine_meaning: Local synthetic data, local checker, and boundary flags pass.
A required local artifact, checker, or boundary flag is missing or failing.
A local artifact marks source support as needed before claim bearing public use.

release_gate_summary.source_check_rule: Source flags stay open unless repo local source review evidence exists.

layers.decision_reason: The schema, source fixture, normalized fixture, and local checker pass on synthetic records with missing data and source support fields present.
The transition fixture checker passes with state and transition boundaries, missing variable coverage, and red flag coverage.
The scoring check matches expected pass and fail controls; expected fail rows are verifier controls, not release blockers.
The event fixture checker passes role order and safety flags; source checker events remain bounded as unresolved checks.
